messages: Memory access fault by GPU node-2: Reason: Unknown

read: S512 sparse-LI also faults with one visible MI350 and EP=1/FSDP=1, so the failure is not primarily multi-rank EP all-to-all. The stack reaches FSDP fully_shard post-backward collection after sparse-LI autograd has contributed gradients.
